title: Eva runs the note to Papa
prompt: Mid-shot at the surf line on @beach-shore. @Papa already standing ankle-deep in the gentle surf, hands on his hips, looking out at the horizon. @Eva already mid-stride a few feet from Papa on the dry sand, holding the unrolled @rescue-note up over her head with both hands like a victory flag, curly blonde hair flying. Eva (yelling joyfully): "DADDY! GINGER NEEDS US!" Papa (turning, surprised, kneeling down to her level as she stops in front of him): "Whoa whoa, slow down, sweet pea — what's this?" Eva (panting, holding the note up to his face): "She's STUCK on an ISLAND! READ IT, Daddy, READ IT!" Papa takes the note carefully, eyebrows shooting up.
